title: RNA-KG
author: Cavalleri, Emanuele
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Linked open data from selected sources and (cleaned) ontology for constructing  RNA-KG v2.0 . 
 
 Raw data are stored in  resources  
 The database dump is stored in  rnakgv20.dump  
 List of nodes and edges are provided in CSV in  graph.zip  
 Code is available on  GitHub  
 
 RNA-KG v2.0 can be queried at:  https://neo4j.biodata.di.unimi.it  (usr and pwd: rnakgv20). 
 RNA-KG v2.0 website which includes documentation, visualization facilities, and predefined views (subgraphs of interest) is available at:  https://RNA-KG.biodata.di.unimi.it .
